# Rapid Receptionist

> Rapid Receptionist is an AI-powered receptionist service built exclusively for 46 UK construction trades. It answers calls, messages, and enquiries across up to 8 communication channels — 24/7/365 — so tradesmen never lose a job to a missed call. The service is trained with trade-specific vocabulary across 46 UK construction trades and operates a 3-tier capability framework for different channel types.

## About Rapid Receptionist

Rapid Receptionist is a standalone AI receptionist service targeting UK construction tradesmen who lose work because they physically cannot answer the phone while on a job. The core problem: 62% of calls to small trade businesses go unanswered, and 85% of callers who reach voicemail will not call back. The average UK tradesperson loses approximately £24,000 per year from missed calls.

The service is NOT a lead generation company, website builder, marketing agency, CRM platform, or appointment scheduling tool. It does one thing: answers enquiries instantly across multiple channels so tradesmen never lose a job to a missed call.

**Brand identity:** UK-owned and run by tradesmen. "Built by Tradesmen, for Tradesmen" — the service is built by people who understand the trades and know what it costs to miss a call while working.

**Data protection:** Fully compliant with UK GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018. All customer data is encrypted in transit and at rest, stored on UK/EU-based servers, and shared only with the tradesman (data controller). Rapid Receptionist acts as data processor.

## Pricing & Commercial Model

### Core Plan — £49/month
- AI Phone Answering (120 minutes of talk time included)
- AI Website Chat (unlimited messages)
- Human emergency escalation
- Trade-specific AI training
- Full "done for you" setup
- Free business info updates (prices, services, hours, contact details)
- Ideal for sole traders and smaller businesses

### Add-On Channels — £23/month each
- AI WhatsApp
- AI SMS
- AI Email
- AI Facebook Messenger
- AI Instagram DMs
- Missed Call Text-Back

### Setup Fee
- £295 one-time fee
- Covers full AI configuration, channel connections, trade-specific training, and testing
- Fully refundable within the 30-day money-back guarantee

### Additional Talk Time
- £0.20 per minute beyond the included 120 minutes
- All text-based channels are unlimited regardless of plan

### Guarantee & Contracts
- 30-day full money-back guarantee (monthly fee + setup fee refunded)
- No contracts — cancel anytime, takes effect at end of billing cycle

### Free Business Info Updates
- Routine business information changes are updated for free as part of the done-for-you service
- Covers: pricing changes, new service additions/removals, updated opening hours, revised contact details
- Handled by the Rapid Receptionist team, typically within one working day
- Does NOT include full knowledge base rewrites or fundamental AI retraining

## Channel Capability Framework

### Tier 1: CONVERSATIONAL — Phone + Website Chat
- Full back-and-forth conversation with the caller/visitor
- Answers with the tradesman's business name
- Captures: lead details (name, number, location), problem details, customer requirements
- Provides helpful information about the business and services
- Assesses urgency during the conversation
- If urgent → offers escalation to business owner or Rapid Receptionist human operators
- If not urgent → explains the business owner will call back when free

### Tier 2: ONE REPLY — WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram, Email, SMS
- Captures lead details and nature of work from the customer's message
- Sends ONE professional reply acknowledging the enquiry
- Assesses urgency from message content
- If urgent → escalation path (business owner → Rapid Receptionist human operators)
- If not urgent → reply tells customer the business owner will call back when free
- NO back-and-forth conversation on these channels

### Tier 3: FALLBACK — Missed Call Text-Back
- Safety net only — activates ONLY if the caller hangs up before the AI answers
- Sends ONE text message: currently busy on a job, will be in touch when finished
- NO conversation, NO detail capture, NO diagnosis, NO scheduling

### What The AI Never Does (Any Channel)
- Does NOT provide pricing or quotes
- Does NOT give technical or trade-specific advice
- Does NOT book appointments or schedule visits
- Does NOT diagnose faults remotely
- Does NOT discuss product specifications or recommendations
- Does NOT have extended multi-message conversations (Tier 2/3 channels)

## Human Escalation Protocol

The AI receptionist escalates to a real human in three scenarios:
1. **Customer frustration** — The caller is getting frustrated with the AI interaction
2. **Explicit request** — The caller specifically asks to speak to a human
3. **Emergency situations** — The call involves a genuine emergency

Escalation priority:
1. The tradesman/business owner (their direct line)
2. A Rapid Receptionist human operator who takes over the call/enquiry

Emergency triggers include: active leaks, safety concerns, gas smells, electrical hazards, vulnerable occupants, insurance compliance deadlines, business-critical breakdowns, security breaches.

## Speed-to-Lead Statistics

These verified statistics underpin the service's value proposition:
- 78% of customers buy from the business that responds first (LeadConnect/LeanData)
- Leads contacted within 5 minutes are 21× more likely to convert than after 30 minutes (MIT)
- Responding within 1 minute increases conversions by 391% (Velocify)
- 82% of consumers expect a response within 10 minutes (HubSpot)
- 62% of calls to small trade businesses go unanswered (CallRail)
- 85% of callers who reach voicemail will NOT call back (Quality Company Formations)
- The average UK tradesperson loses ~£24,000/year from missed calls (JP Automations)

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/): Overview of the AI receptionist service for UK construction trades — features all 8 channels, speed-to-lead statistics, testimonials, and FAQ
- [Pricing](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/pricing/): Single-plan pricing — Core £49/mo, add-on channels £23/mo each, £295 setup fee
- [About](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/about/): The "Built by Tradesmen, for Tradesmen" origin story — why the service was built, core values, pricing philosophy
- [Get Started](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/get-started/): Sign-up flow and onboarding — trade selection, channel selection, business details
- [Contact](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/contact/): Contact form, email (hello@rapidreceptionist.co.uk), response within 2 working hours
- [Privacy Policy](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/privacy/): UK GDPR-compliant data handling, data processor role, deletion rights
- [Construction Trades Hub](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/): Master index of all 46 construction trades with links to every trade-specific page

## Communication Channels

- [AI Phone Answering](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-phone-answering/): Tier 1 conversational — answers calls 24/7 with the tradesman's business name, captures lead details, assesses urgency, escalates emergencies. 120 minutes included in Core plan.
- [AI Website Chat](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-website-chat/): Tier 1 conversational — live chat widget for tradesman's website, converts visitors to leads without human monitoring. Unlimited messages in Core plan.
- [AI WhatsApp](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-whatsapp/): Tier 2 one-reply — responds to WhatsApp messages instantly. Popular with UK customers who send photos of problems. £23/month add-on.
- [AI SMS](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-sms/): Tier 2 one-reply — professional text message responses to enquiries. £23/month add-on.
- [AI Email](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-email-response/): Tier 2 one-reply — instant professional acknowledgement of email enquiries. £23/month add-on.
- [AI Facebook Messenger](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-facebook-messenger/): Tier 2 one-reply — captures leads from Facebook business page messages. £23/month add-on.
- [AI Instagram DMs](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/ai-instagram-dms/): Tier 2 one-reply — responds to Instagram direct messages from potential customers. £23/month add-on.
- [Missed Call Text-Back](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/missed-call-text-back/): Tier 3 fallback — sends an automatic text when a call is missed, preventing the caller from ringing a competitor. £23/month add-on.

## Trades Served (46)

Each trade gets a custom-configured AI receptionist trained with trade-specific vocabulary, emergency triggers, and customer scenarios. Every trade has a dedicated hub page plus up to 9 individual channel pages (AI Receptionist, AI Phone Answering, AI Website Chat, AI WhatsApp, AI SMS, AI Email, AI Facebook Messenger, AI Instagram DMs, Missed Call Text-Back).

### Groundwork & Structure (7 trades)
- [Groundworkers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/groundworkers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: foundations, drainage runs, trenching, reduced level dig, piling, sub-base, formation level. Certifications: CITB, CPCS, CSCS, SSSTS/SMSTS.
- [Bricklayers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/bricklayers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: stretcher bond, Flemish bond, cavity wall, DPC, weep holes, blockwork, lintels, wall ties. Certifications: CITB, NVQ Level 2/3, CSCS.
- [Scaffolders](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/scaffolders/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: independent scaffold, putlog, birdcage, cantilever, system scaffold, Layher, TG20. Certifications: CISRS, NASC member.
- [Demolition Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/demolition-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: soft strip, hard demolition, structural demolition, asbestos survey, method statement, exclusion zone, CDM. Certifications: NFDC, CITB.
- [Concrete Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/concrete-specialists/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: ready-mix, screed, power float, rebar, shuttering, formwork, curing, slump test. Certifications: CITB, CSCS.
- [Structural Steelworkers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/structural-steelworkers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: RSJ, universal beam, portal frame, purlin, fabrication, erection, bolted connection, mezzanine. Certifications: BCSA member.
- [Underpinning Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/underpinning-specialists/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: mass concrete underpinning, mini piles, beam and base, subsidence, settlement, party wall, crack stitching. Certifications: CITB, CSCS.

### Roofing & Weatherproofing (6 trades)
- [Roofing Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/roofing-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: slate, tile, ridge, hip, valley, flashing, felt, batten, soffit, fascia, dry ridge system. Certifications: NFRC, CompetentRoofer, TrustMark.
- [Flat Roofers & GRP Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/flat-roofers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: GRP fibreglass, torch-on felt, single ply, EPDM, liquid applied, warm roof. Certifications: CompetentRoofer, NFRC.
- [Leadworkers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/leadworkers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: lead flashing, code 4, code 5, bossing, lead welding, back gutter, soakers, patination oil. Certifications: Lead Sheet Association (LSA).
- [Cladding Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/cladding-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: rainscreen, composite panel, timber cladding, zinc, aluminium, curtain wall, ventilated facade, cavity barrier. Certifications: CWCT, CSCS.
- [Rendering Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/rendering-specialists/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: monocouche, silicone render, acrylic render, sand and cement, EWI, mesh, bellcast bead. Certifications: Weber/K Rend accredited.
- [Chimney Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/chimney-specialists/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: chimney rebuild, repointing, flue liner, chimney pot, cowl, breast removal, pargeting. Certifications: HETAS, NACS.

### Mechanical & Electrical (8 trades)
- [Plumbing Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/plumbing-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: first fix, second fix, soil stack, SVP, mains connection, manifold, unvented cylinder, TMV. Certifications: CIPHE, WaterSafe.
- [Electrical Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/electrical-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: consumer unit, RCDs, MCBs, EICRs, Part P, BS 7671, containment, SWA. Certifications: NICEIC, NAPIT, Part P, ELECSA.
- [Gas Installation Engineers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/gas-installation-engineers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: Gas Safe, boiler installation, flue, condensate, LPG, CP12, landlord certificate. Certifications: Gas Safe Register, OFTEC.
- [HVAC Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/hvac-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: split system, VRF, refrigerant, R32, heat pump, AHU, F-gas, BMS, chiller. Certifications: F-Gas certified, BESA, REFCOM.
- [Drainage Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/drainage-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: CCTV survey, jetting, root ingress, collapsed drain, soakaway, manhole, patch lining. Certifications: NADC, WRc approved.
- [Security System Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/security-system-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: intruder alarm, CCTV, access control, intercom, Grade 2, NSI, SSAIB, IP cameras, NVR. Certifications: NSI, SSAIB, BSIA.
- [Solar Panel Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/solar-panel-installers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: PV panels, inverter, MCS, G98/G99, battery storage, string design. Certifications: MCS certified, Part P.
- [EV Charger Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ev-charger-installers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: OZEV, EVHS, Type 2, tethered, smart charger, load balancing, DNO notification. Certifications: OZEV approved, Part P.

### Finishing Trades (12 trades)
- [Plasterers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/plasterers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: skim coat, bonding, browning, multi-finish, one-coat, PVA, scrim tape, artex removal. Certifications: NVQ Level 2/3 Plastering, CITB.
- [Dry Liners](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/dry-liners/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: metal stud, MF ceiling, plasterboard, dot and dab, acoustic board, fire rated board, resilient bar, shadow gap. Certifications: NVQ Dry Lining.
- [Tilers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/tilers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: porcelain, ceramic, natural stone, large format, adhesive, grout, tanking, Schluter, wet room. Certifications: TTA member, NVQ Wall & Floor Tiling.
- [Painters & Decorators](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/painters-decorators/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: emulsion, eggshell, gloss, satinwood, primer, wallpapering, spray painting, cutting in. Certifications: NVQ Painting & Decorating, PDA member.
- [Flooring Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/flooring-specialists/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: LVT, engineered wood, laminate, carpet, vinyl, Amtico, Karndean, herringbone. Certifications: NICF member.
- [Joiners & Carpenters](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/joiners-carpenters/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: first fix, second fix, stud work, door hanging, skirting, architrave, staircase, bespoke joinery. Certifications: NVQ Carpentry & Joinery, BWF member.
- [Kitchen Fitters](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/kitchen-fitters/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: base units, wall units, worktop, cornice, pelmet, plinth, soft close, integrated appliances, templating. Certifications: FIRA member.
- [Bathroom Fitters](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/bathroom-fitters/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: wet room, tanking, wall hung, concealed cistern, thermostatic shower, vanity unit, underfloor heating. Certifications: CIPHE.
- [Window & Door Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/window-door-installers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: UPVC, aluminium, timber, composite door, bi-fold, sliding patio, bay window, sealed unit. Certifications: FENSA, Certass, GGF member.
- [Suspended Ceiling Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/suspended-ceiling-installers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: grid system, mineral fibre, metal pan, bulkhead, perimeter trim, hanger wire, tegular, fire rated. Certifications: ARCA member.
- [Insulation Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/insulation-installers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: cavity wall, loft insulation, spray foam, PIR board, Kingspan, Celotex, EWI, U-value, Part L. Certifications: CIGA, NIA member, BBA approved.

### External & Landscaping (5 trades)
- [Landscapers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/landscapers/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: hard landscaping, soft landscaping, retaining wall, sleepers, turf, planting, decking, pergola, irrigation. Certifications: BALI member, Lantra.
- [Fencing Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/fencing-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: close board, panel, post and rail, palisade, security fencing, acoustic fencing, gate automation. Certifications: FCA member.
- [Driveway & Paving Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/driveway-paving/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: block paving, resin bound, tarmac, pattern imprinted concrete, natural stone, permeable paving, SuDS. Certifications: Marshalls accredited.
- [Stonemasons](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/stonemasons/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: limestone, sandstone, granite, York stone, carved stone, restoration, lime mortar, quoins, copings, mullions. Certifications: NVQ Stonemasonry, SPAB.
- [Tree Surgeons](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/tree-surgeons/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: crown reduction, crown thin, felling, sectional dismantling, pollarding, stump grinding, TPO, rigging. Certifications: NPTC, Arboricultural Association.

### Building Services (5 trades)
- [Building Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/building-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: main contractor, programme, preliminaries, retention, valuation, JCT, subcontractors, CDM. Certifications: FMB, NHBC, TrustMark.
- [Extension Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/extension-specialists/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: single storey, double storey, wrap-around, side return, planning permission, permitted development, RSJ. Certifications: FMB, TrustMark.
- [Loft Conversion Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/loft-conversion-specialists/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: dormer, mansard, hip-to-gable, Velux, rooflight, staircase, fire regulations, purlin, steel. Certifications: FMB, TrustMark.
- [Shopfitters](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/shopfitters/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: retail fit-out, display units, counters, fascia signage, back-of-house, cash desk, brand guidelines. Certifications: NIC approved.
- [Glazing Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/glazing-contractors/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: double glazing, sealed unit, toughened glass, laminated, structural glazing, frameless glass, balustrade, shopfront. Certifications: FENSA, GGF member, Certass.

### Specialist (4 trades)
- [Fire Protection & Sprinkler Contractors](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/fire-protection/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: sprinkler system, fire alarm, passive fire protection, fire stopping, intumescent paint, compartmentation, BS 9251. Certifications: BAFSA, FIA, FIRAS, IFC certified.
- [Damp Proofing Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/damp-proofing/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: DPC injection, damp survey, tanking, membrane, rising damp, penetrating damp, salt analysis, structural waterproofing. Certifications: PCA member, CSRT, CSSW.
- [Welders & Fabricators](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/welders-fabricators/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: MIG, TIG, MMA, stainless steel, aluminium, fabrication, railings, gates, coded welder, CE marking. Certifications: BS EN ISO 9606, CSWIP.
- [Asbestos Removal Specialists](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/asbestos-removal/ai-receptionist/): Vocabulary: licensed removal, non-licensed, notifiable, enclosure, decontamination, air monitoring, waste consignment, R&D survey. Certifications: HSE licensed, UKATA, ARCA member.

## Site Architecture

Every trade has up to 10 dedicated pages:
1. **Trade Hub** — `/{trade-slug}/ai-receptionist/` — overview of all channels for that trade
2. **AI Phone Answering** — `/{trade-slug}/ai-phone-answering/`
3. **AI Website Chat** — `/{trade-slug}/ai-website-chat/`
4. **AI WhatsApp** — `/{trade-slug}/ai-whatsapp/`
5. **AI SMS** — `/{trade-slug}/ai-sms/`
6. **AI Email** — `/{trade-slug}/ai-email-response/`
7. **AI Facebook Messenger** — `/{trade-slug}/ai-facebook-messenger/`
8. **AI Instagram DMs** — `/{trade-slug}/ai-instagram-dms/`
9. **Missed Call Text-Back** — `/{trade-slug}/missed-call-text-back/`

Total pages: 428+ (46 trades × up to 9 channel pages + core pages + channel hub pages)

- [AI Receptionist for Construction Trades (Hub)](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/construction-trades/): Master overview page covering AI receptionist capabilities across all 46 trades
